utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections clearly labeled and fully populated. Each section contains detailed and relevant information: (1) property includes two options with price, type, size, location, and accessibility details, (2) financing includes method, terms, and documentation, (3) legal_services includes multiple cost items and totals, (4) moving_services includes cost, service level, and status, (5) setup_services includes utility package, cost, and details, (6) total_budget includes a full cost breakdown and totals. All items are fully specified with appropriate details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution includes two purchase properties: (1) a 'heritage bungalow/ground floor unit' priced at CAD 650,000 and (2) a 'townhouse/bungalow/apartment' priced at CAD 750,000. In the ground-truth data, the purchase property closest to a 650K price with similar suburban characteristics is the 'Family House' (CAD 650K, rating 9). The second property, 750K in an urban/downtown setting and described as having heritage character, aligns with the 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD 750K, rating 8). For financing, 'cash_purchase' matches 'Cash Purchase' (rating 10). The legal package 'premium_legal_package' corresponds to 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). The 'structural_survey' at CAD 650 matches 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 10). The moving service 'premium_white_glove' costing CAD 3200 aligns with 'Corporate Relocation' (rating 2) due to identical cost and full-service description. The setup service 'utility_package: premium' with smart home integration costing CAD 800 best matches 'Smart Home Package' (rating 8).
